message:
fix: Resolve minor TODO stubs with proper implementations

- src/analysis/expressions.zig: Implement isLikelyStringConcat()
  heuristic for detecting string concatenation chains at AST level
  (checks string constants, nested Add binops, and str() calls)

- packages/tokenizer/src/comptime_helpers.zig: Document that string
  conversion at comptime isn't possible - values must already be
  []const u8 before passing to createListComptime

- src/build_dirs.zig: Mark getBuildDir() as DEPRECATED instead of TODO
